activeStandardUsers.soql: SELECT Id, Username, ProfileId FROM User WHERE IsActive = true AND UserType = 'Standard'
activeStandardUsers.description: All active standard users — used by MFA, admin, and inactive checks

profileIpRanges.soql: SELECT ProfileId, StartAddress, EndAddress FROM ProfileLoginIpRange
profileIpRanges.description: Profile login IP ranges — not queryable in all org configurations

orgLimits.description: Org API governor limits — fetched via ctx.rest.get('/limits')

sobjectDescribe.description: SObject describe for OWD/sharing model — called per object via ctx.rest.get(). Used by SharingModelCheck.
